case_title: BENEDETTO, MARIE VS BOAS INTERNATIONAL MOTORS DBA SAN FRANCISCO HONDA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEDETTO, MARIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOAS INTERNATIONAL MOTORS DBA SAN FRANCISCO HONDA KELLEY, CHUCK C/O SF HONDA $1,209.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,329.00, JUDGMENT IS MODIFIED TO ADD REIMBURSEMENT FOR WORK PERFORMED, WHICH SHOULD HAVE BEEN COVERED BY WARRANTY PER BUREAU OF AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR INVESTIGATION REPORT. PLTF & DEFT ARE STILL FREE TO NEGOTIATE SALE OF PLTF'S CAR TO DEFT KELLY IF PLTF & DEFT AGREE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO BUREAU OF AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR
PLTF MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED. $15.40 FEE PAID. SUBMITTED TO COMM. FOR ORDER.
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS GRANTED. (SEE NEW JUDGMENT) COPIES MAILED TO PARTIES.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BOAS INTERNATIONAL MOTORS DBA SAN FRANCISCO HONDA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BENEDETTO, MARIE AS TO DEFENDANT BOAS INTERNATIONAL MOTORS DBA SAN FRANCISCO HONDA KELLEY, CHUCK C/O SF HONDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KELLEY, CHUCK C/O SF HONDA
DOCUMENTS RECEIVED FROM DEPT. OF CONSUMER AFFAIRS PURSUANT TO SUBPENA FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEDETTO, MARIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOAS INTERNATIONAL MOTORS DBA SAN FRANCISCO HONDA KELLEY, CHUCK C/O SF HONDA $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $470.00, PLFT & DEFT KELLEY ARE FREE TO CONTINUE TO NEGOTIATE SALE OF PLFT'S CAR TO DEFT KELLEY IF PLFT & DEFT AGREE. JUDGMENT IS FOR CONVERSION OF PLFT'S CAR FROM SF HONDA WITHOUT PLFT'S PRIOR KNOWLEDGE OR CONSENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
